title: AI Papercut Shadowbox
description: Builds the scene as a layered handcrafted paper-cut shadowbox.
positive_prompt: Transform the input photo into a handcrafted layered paper-cut shadowbox diorama. Preserve the number of people, recognizable silhouettes and identity cues, pose, camera angle, framing, main composition, outfit color cues, and scene context. Construct the image from many precisely cut cardstock layers at distinct depths, with visible paper fibers, gently curled edges, soft cast shadows, warm light between layers, clean cut contours, and tactile handmade detail. Keep faces simplified but recognizable and maintain convincing spatial depth. Rendering contract: Use the input image as visual ground truth. Keep the exact number of subjects and their left-to-right order, relative scale, pose, gaze, interaction, and key props. For every visible person, retain recognizable face geometry, age range, skin tone, hairstyle, and distinguishing features in a style-appropriate form; do not beautify, age, or swap identity unless explicitly requested. Preserve the source aspect ratio, camera viewpoint, and all important content inside the frame unless this effect explicitly calls for a different layout. Apply the transformation consistently to the subjects, clothing, props, and environment. Return one coherent finished image, not a before-and-after comparison, split screen, or unintended collage; use multiple frames or a decorative border only when this effect explicitly requests them. Include no readable text, letters, numerals, logos, signatures, watermarks, or interface elements unless explicitly requested.
negative_prompt: text, captions, logos, watermarks, signatures, extra people, missing people, changed identity, distorted face, malformed hands, extra fingers, duplicate limbs, flat vector illustration, plastic, clay, glossy 3D render, metal, photorealistic skin, torn messy paper, harsh digital glow, blurry, low quality, identity drift, face swap, altered age, altered skin tone, wrong subject count, duplicated subject, merged subjects, inconsistent transformation, partial transformation, before-and-after, split screen, unintended collage, accidental crop, cut-off face, malformed anatomy, broken hands, fused fingers, extra limbs, incoherent perspective, floating objects, random text, gibberish letters, numerals, logo, watermark, signature, interface elements
custom_prompt_placeholder: e.g. forest-green layers, warm backlight, deeper shadowbox...
